CustomMetadata.label: Step 4: EC OBS Pre- Curriculum Start

values.value:
SMS - [If NOT registered for webinar] Hi [Customer name], this is [insert OBS name], your Onboarding Specialist with Experience Curriculum. The best first step in using the curriculum materials is to attend one of our Getting Started webinars! The next [insert age level] webinar is scheduled for [Insert next two available web times]. Do either of those times work for you?
[If registered for webinar] Hi [Customer name], this is [insert OBS name], your Onboarding Specialist with Experience Curriculum. I have here that you are planning to start your first lesson on [Insert lesson start date]. Is that correct?
EC OBS (EC Only): Pre-Curriculum Start Sequence
SMS: encourage webinar registration - include date and time of next webinar
